meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no project ideas. Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress your clients.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' paralysis ends when you stop building from scratch and start optimizing user onboarding. By focusing on the first 60 seconds of a user's journey, you create high-value, repeatable micro-SaaS features that clients pay a premium for, instantly solving your lack of project direction.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the graveyard of ambition. You stare at the cursor, waiting for a 'unique' idea that never arrives, while your freelance pipeline sits empty. The reality is that clients don't pay for abstract innovation; they pay for friction reduction.

User onboarding is the most undervalued asset in software. By mastering the art of the 'First Run Experience,' you stop chasing ideas and start building solutions that directly impact client retention. This checklist transforms your development workflow into a high-velocity machine, leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code to turn simple onboarding flows into professional-grade assets.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides value to the user. We will build a skeleton flow that guides the user to this moment in under three clicks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a user onboarding flow that tracks progress through three distinct setup steps ending in a 'Success' state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a React component for a three-step progress tracker with smooth transitions.'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Walkthrough
steps.description: Create a non-intrusive modal system that highlights core features without blocking the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable React Modal component for feature highlighting using Framer Motion for entrance animations.

steps.title: Implement State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the user doesn't see the onboarding again if they finish or dismiss it. Save state to local storage or a database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom hook useOnboardingState that syncs completion status with localStorage and a mock API endpoint.

steps.title: Add Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Provide micro-guidance only when the user hovers over complex inputs, reducing cognitive load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Tooltip component that detects hover events and displays content based on a provided key-value map.

steps.title: Integrate Analytics Tracking
steps.description: Capture where users drop off in the onboarding to provide clients with data-driven improvements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add an event tracking wrapper to the onboarding steps that sends 'step_completed' events to a mock analytics dashboard.

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a modular wrapper; clients will pay extra to toggle it on/off for different user segments.
Use 'Skeleton Screens' during the onboarding process to keep users engaged while data loads in the background.
Limit onboarding to three steps maximum; anything longer increases churn by 40%.
Never force an account creation before the 'Aha!' moment; let them experience the value first, then capture the lead.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your onboarding logic immediately after building to ensure client-ready stability.
resources: UX Collective Onboarding Best Practices: https://uxdesign.cc
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy it to a staging environment and ask a non-technical friend to try it. Use their feedback to refine the UI labels until the flow is completely self-explanatory.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping assets that clients fight over. By mastering the onboarding flow, you provide immediate, measurable ROI for every project you touch. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
